title: protium carana
intro: Protium carana, also known as the Protium tree or Padauk tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. This tree has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Protium carana include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and treating various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Protium carana include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be made by boiling the leaves or bark in water and applying the resulting liquid or paste to the affected area.
